name: ARTEMIS_REPO_ENV
override_behavior: `=<path>` → fallback alias for `RH_ENV_FILE`; emits deprecation notice

name: SC_PRE_TAG_GATE_BYPASS
override_behavior: `=<csv>` → skip the named steps (v1.49.653 L-02 consolidation + v1.49.654 depth-audit-mus-elc granular bypass; v1.49.962 reconciled to the gate's honored gate_bypassed tokens + parity-pinned by tests/integration/bypass-vocab-parity.test.ts — core steps build/version-sequence/vitest/completeness/www-bundles are intentionally NOT bypassable via this CSV (version-sequence has its own SC_SKIP_VERSION_SEQUENCE_CHECK; the others run unconditionally); vocabulary: tools-suite, tools-node-test, integration, ci-gate, depth-audit, depth-audit-mus-elc, claude-md, card-template-length, catalog-index, tauri-boundary, apply-to-self, scaffolder-residue, citation-debt-sync, story-drift, discipline-coverage, sps-cohort-uniqueness, nasa-canonical-layout, nasa-canonical-sidebar, project-md, stale-known-unwired, state-backups, adoption-freshness)

name: SC_PRE_TAG_GATE_REQUIRE
override_behavior: `=<csv>` → escalate WARN-only steps to BLOCKER (apply-to-self, citation-debt-sync, story-drift, adoption-freshness currently WARN-only)

name: SC_ADOPTION_BASELINE_MAX_DRIFT
default_behavior: unset → pre-tag-gate step 20 (adoption-freshness, v1.49.965 Ship 0.1) tolerates the newest `docs/ADOPTION-BASELINE-v*.json` trailing the shipping version by up to 30 ships before it WARNs (forward-progress mode, not exact-match — avoids churning a fresh baseline every ship)
override_behavior: `=<N>` → set a custom ship-drift tolerance (e.g. `=10` strict, `=50` lenient). Refresh the baseline with `node tools/adoption-refresh.mjs` (AFTER bump-version, #10424). Consumed by `tools/adoption-baseline-freshness.mjs`

name: SC_SKIP_CI_GATE
default_behavior: unset → verify CI green on origin/dev (HARD RULE)
override_behavior: `=1` → skip CI-on-dev verification step in pre-tag-gate (emergency only — fix the failing CI instead)

name: BUILD_WWW_BUNDLES_QUIET
override_behavior: `=1` → suppress step labels in `tools/build-www-bundles.sh` (errors still printed)

name: SC_SKIP_CLAUDE_MD_GATE
default_behavior: unset → run CLAUDE.md auto-render check in pre-tag-gate step 7
override_behavior: `=1` → skip CLAUDE.md drift check (emergency only — run `npm run render:claude-md` and commit instead)

name: SC_SKIP_CATALOG_INDEX_GATE
default_behavior: unset → run catalog-index drift check in pre-tag-gate step 8
override_behavior: `=1` → skip catalog-index drift check (emergency only — run `node tools/update-catalog-indexes.mjs --check` and fix instead)

name: SC_SKIP_TRACK_CARDS_GATE
default_behavior: unset → enforce NASA Research Track cards (8/8 unique Track 1a/1b/2/3/4/5/6/7) + bottom-of-content nav-card in depth-audit (BLOCKER mode at v1.49.603 introduction)
override_behavior: `=1` → downgrade track-card-coverage + nav-card-presence FAIL → WARN (emergency only — author the missing cards instead)

name: SC_SKIP_DEPTH_AUDIT_MUS_ELC
default_behavior: unset → MUS/ELC FAIL findings block in pre-tag-gate step 6; SCAFFOLD-PENDING marker (from tools/scaffold-cross-track-dirs.mjs) already downgrades FAIL→WARN-equivalent
override_behavior: `=1` → downgrade any MUS/ELC FAIL or SCAFFOLD-PENDING to WARN in rollup (FA-652-11 C05; granular alternative to blanket SC_SKIP_DEPTH_AUDIT)
